command: for f in docs/research/index.md docs/research/trends.md docs/research/entities/bitcoin.md docs/research/entities/fed.md docs/research/topics/crypto-flow.md docs/research/topics/macro-rates.md docs/research/lab/agent-runtime-hybrid.md docs/research/lab/ops-audit-2026-04-12.md docs/research/lab/nel-qa-architecture-research.md; do status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 10 "https://www.hyo.world/$f"); echo "$status /$f"; done
